title: Feuilleea altissima
taxonomy: Feuilleea altissima is classified within the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the order Celastrales and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the kingdom Plantae, Feuilleea altissima is further classified under the division Magnoliophyta. The species is also known for being closely related to other plants in the same family, such as the genus Euonymus. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
